kpi.prompt: Summe der offenen Forderungen mit Mahnstufe größer gleich 2; ein einzelner Datensatz.
kpi.sql_string:
SELECT
  ROUND(SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN payment_status IN ('reminder2', 'reminder3', 'collection')
       AND payment_status <> 'completed'
      THEN COALESCE(target_amount, 0) - COALESCE(current_amount_paid, 0)
      ELSE 0
    END
  ), 2) AS "Offene Forderungen ab Mahnstufe 2"
FROM invoices
WHERE status NOT IN ('canceled', 'created', 'unknown')
  AND payment_status IN ('reminder2', 'reminder3', 'collection')
;

en.title: Receivables in dunning ≥ level 2
en.description: Value of open receivables currently in dunning stage 2 or higher — at acute collection risk.

de.title: Forderungen ab Mahnstufe 2
de.description: Wert der offenen Forderungen ab Mahnstufe 2 — akutes Ausfallrisiko.
